payload.subject: Richard Maxwell b.1774
payload.hypothesis: Richard Maxwell b.1774 Bourbon Co. KY is the son of a DIFFERENT William Maxwell who died in Ohio (not the William b.1740 Buittle, Scotland).

result.description: Test whether Richard b.1774 descends from the Ohio William Maxwell line.
result.hypothesis_tested: Richard b.1774 is son of William Maxwell d. Ohio.
result.why_this_matters: Disambiguates which William fathered Richard before we extend the Scottish line.
result.what_we_did_and_result: Checked the Ohio William's probate and the 1810 census; his named heirs do not include a Richard, and he was in Ohio while Richard was documented in Illinois.
result.how_results_affect_goal: Removes the Ohio William as a candidate father; strengthens the Scottish William b.1740 hypothesis by elimination.
result.what_we_did_with_results: Marked the Ohio William candidate as ruled_out in the lead set.
result.next_step: Pursue Scottish William b.1740 emigration records.

steps.source: Ohio County probate index — William Maxwell will, Gibson Co. OH
steps.query: William Maxwell will Ohio 1815 heirs Richard
steps.found: Will names heirs John, James, Mary — no Richard.
Ohio William present in OH in 1810 while Richard documented in Shawneetown IL by 1796.

result.verdict_reason: Probate heirs and concurrent geography both exclude the Ohio William as Richard's father.
next_directions_suggested: Search Scottish emigration/passenger lists for William b.1740 Buittle
Check Bourbon Co. KY land grants 1786 for a William Maxwell
